summary: Frontend-only regression + new-feature verification for iteration_3: FR/EN i18n toggle, before/after draggable slider (3 instances in gallery), contact form after i18n changes, plus regression of navbar scroll, /blog list & article page, and admin login. All new features and regressions pass end-to-end via the public preview URL.

frontend_playwright: Default lang is FR on fresh browser (localStorage empty) - hero shows 'Réparation d\'ordinateurs portables de confiance.'
data-testid=lang-toggle-desktop is visible at 1920px width and shows current lang code (FR by default)
Clicking lang-toggle-desktop switches UI to EN — toggle text becomes 'EN', hero becomes 'Professional laptop repair you can trust.', nav-accueil label becomes 'Home'
localStorage 'moukis_lang' = 'en' after toggle; persists across page reload (still EN after F5)
Toggling back returns hero to French 'Réparation d\'ordinateurs portables de confiance.'
#galerie section renders exactly 3 elements with data-testid='before-after-slider'
Before/After labels are localized: FR shows 'Avant'/'Après'/'Glissez pour comparer'; EN shows 'Before'/'After'/'Drag to compare'
Dragging the slider handle (mousedown at center + mousemove to 20% of width + mouseup) changes the inner reveal div style.width from 50% to ~19.8% — the 'before' image is now correctly clipped
Contact form empty submit renders all three inline errors: error-name, error-email, error-message
Invalid email ('not-an-email') keeps error-email visible while clearing error-name after name is filled
Service Select opens and shows translated service titles (in EN mode, 'Full Diagnostics' option is present and selectable)
Valid submit POST /api/contact returns 201 and success toast 'Message sent! We\'ll get back to you very soon.' appears
Navbar nav-services click scrolls the page down (scrollY reaches ~3822px) to the services section
Nav-blog click routes to /blog; blog list renders (11 anchor-like links to /blog/*)
Clicking an article card navigates to /blog/<slug> and article page renders

Admin login at /admin/login with rewllasy@gmail.com / MoukisTech2025! -> POST /api/auth/login = 200, redirects to /admin, dashboard renders Messages+Blog tabs and lists contacts (including the TEST_Playwright User just created)

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.jsx: initial state reads localStorage but does NOT set document.documentElement.lang on first mount — only updates it via changeLang. Minor: on a fresh visit, <html lang='en'> stays from index.html even though UI is French. Cosmetic (accessibility hint) — consider a useEffect that syncs document.documentElement.lang = lang on mount.

BeforeAfter.jsx clipped image uses inline style width={ref.current?.offsetWidth || '100%'} which is read during render before the ref is populated on first paint — the image may briefly render at container width 0 on mount (works fine in practice because the outer div width % clips it, but the inner img width is redundant and slightly hacky). Consider using width: '100%' unconditionally and letting the parent clip.

Navbar nav-{key} testids derived from `l.to.replace('/#','').replace('/','')` produce 'nav-blog' for '/blog' and 'nav-accueil' for '/#accueil' — inconsistent naming convention (some are page routes, some are section ids). Works, but a testid map keyed by section name would be cleaner.
Contact.jsx re-renders date-fns locale on every render; not perf-critical but could be memoized.
translations.js is a single 237-line file — as more sections are added this will grow; split by feature (nav.js, hero.js, etc.) if it exceeds ~500 lines.
test_credentials: Admin: rewllasy@gmail.com / MoukisTech2025! (Bearer JWT in localStorage 'moukis_token')
seed_data_creation: Created one public contact via UI: name='TEST_Playwright User', email='TEST_playwright@example.com', service='Full Diagnostics', message='This is a valid test message.'. Not cleaned up — visible in admin Messages list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new frontend features (FR/EN toggle, before/after slider x3, translated contact select) pass. Backend was NOT re-tested this iteration per request (unchanged since iteration_2 — full suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py). Note: text_content() strips whitespace, so when asserting hero text with playwright, expect e.g. 'Professionallaptoprepairyoucantrust.' not 'Professional laptop repair you can trust.'. Slider drag uses page.mouse.down/move/up on the [data-testid=before-after-slider] element — the reveal div is the FIRST child div with inline style width%.
rca of the issue: No new bugs found. Iteration_3 features work as specified.
